entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: The most important millet in eastern Africa and the subject of the study

entities.name: EASTERN AFRICA
entities.description: Region where finger millet is a primary crop

entities.name: BLAST DISEASE
entities.description: A major factor limiting finger millet production caused by a fungus

entities.name: MAGNAPORTHE GRISEA
entities.description: The fungus that causes blast disease in finger millet

entities.name: CROP WILD RELATIVES
entities.description: Potential sources of novel genes for disease resistance

entities.name: LANDRACES
entities.description: Traditional varieties that serve as a reservoir for novel genes

entities.name: WESTERN KENYA
entities.description: The source of the blast disease isolate used in the study

entities.name: SINGLE-SEED DESCENT
entities.description: Process used to purify germplasm collections over two generations

entities.name: FARMER-PREFERRED VARIETIES
entities.description: Varieties identified through participatory selection and used for screening

entities.name: PARTICIPATORY VARIETAL SELECTION
entities.description: Method used to identify farmer-preferred varieties

entities.name: HAND-SPRAYING METHOD
entities.description: Method used to inoculate plants with blast disease

entities.name: DISEASE INCIDENCE
entities.description: Data recorded at the grain-filling stage to measure disease impact

entities.name: DART SEQUENCING
entities.description: Diversity arrays technology used to generate genotypic data

entities.name: GENSTAT 18.2
entities.description: Software used for data analysis

entities.name: TASSEL 5.2.58
entities.description: Software used for data analysis

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: Measure of the proportion of variation that is genetic

entities.name: GWAS
entities.description: Genome-wide association study used to identify markers associated with blast disease

entities.name: GENERAL LINEAR MODEL
entities.description: Statistical model used within the GWAS analysis

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COMPONENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis used within the GWAS to handle population structure

entities.name: MARKERS
entities.description: 19 genetic markers associated with blast disease resistance

entities.name: TRAIT INTROGRESSION
entities.description: The process of incorporating novel genes into crop improvement programs
